data.content: Plan review requested revision. The waves route filter fix and alias pipeline are valid, but the RelationshipPicker proposal is unsafe in beat-detail-lightbox: showing existing dependencies as selected badges implies removability, while the current onRemove only mutates local UI state and there is no DELETE /api/beats/[id]/deps path wired here. Revise the plan to either keep existing relationships read-only in the lightbox or explicitly add dependency-removal API/UI behavior and distinguish persisted vs staged selections. Also, cascade-close-dialog cannot show aliases with the proposed changes alone because CascadeDescendant/getOpenDescendants do not carry alias; either extend that data path or remove that item from scope.
